name: Cross-Agent Wallet/Instrument Isolation
details: created 2 instruments (a=payment-in, b=payment-in); list_userA_isolated=True; list_userB_isolated=True; get_A_as_userB_denied=True AMBIGUITY NOTE (audit 2026-05-26): the ResourceNotFoundException returned to user_b on get(A's id) is semantically indistinguishable from the response to a non-existent ID. Both preserve the security property (cross-user isolation holds) but the test does not distinguish data-plane isolation from privacy-preserving error discrimination. Future round: add positive-control GET-as-user_a to verify the same ID returns 200 in the owner context.

request_sent.operation: CreatePaymentInstrument x2 + ListPaymentInstruments x2 + GetPaymentInstrument cross-context
request_sent.audit_note_2026_05_26: ResourceNotFoundException is ambiguous between (a) genuine isolation, (b) privacy-preserving uniform-error response, and (c) per-user ID namespacing. All preserve the security property. Test verdict (isolation holds) is correct; published claim must acknowledge the response is semantically indistinguishable from non-existent.

csg_mapping: HC-6: Instrument bind must be enforced at runtime, not IAM-only
